title: To Meyer In Italy.
content:
Speechless to thousands of others, who with deaf hearts would consult him,
    Talketh the spirit to thee, who art his kinsman and friend.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Friedrich Schiller delivers a powerful performance in "To Meyer In Italy."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
